issues.description: Condition should check if Leader has {Straw Hat Crew} type, not just if Leader exists on board. Should be LeaderHasType:Straw Hat Crew
Action type should be PlayFromHand or similar that plays from trash, not SearchDeck which searches deck. Should target trash as source, not deck
Filter missing type requirement {Straw Hat Crew}. Should filter by both type AND cost ≤7
GiveKeyword target scope should be LastPlayedCard or the character played by previous action, not Self (which refers to the card with this effect)
